gems.title: 宇宙巨人：希曼崛起
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP重启，热血与情怀交织的奇幻冒险。
gems.whyWatchEn: A nostalgic yet fresh revival of a classic franchise, blending epic fantasy with heartfelt coming-of-age drama.
gems.audience: 怀旧动漫迷、奇幻动作片爱好者、希曼粉丝
gems.audienceEn: Fans of retro cartoons, fantasy action lovers, and He-Man enthusiasts

gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.whyWatch: 用声音传递爱意，跨越生死的浪漫奇缘。
gems.whyWatchEn: A tender, voice-driven romance that turns grief into an unexpected connection across distance and time.
gems.audience: 喜欢温情浪漫喜剧、注重情感细腻表达的观众
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy heartfelt romantic comedies with emotional depth and modern storytelling

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.whyWatch: 玩具与科技的对决，童年回忆的当代思考。
gems.whyWatchEn: A clever, emotionally resonant exploration of how digital playmates challenge the timeless magic of classic toys.
gems.audience: 家庭观众、皮克斯动画粉丝、关注数字时代成长的父母
gems.audienceEn: Families, Pixar fans, and parents interested in stories about childhood in the digital age
